headline: Truist Raises PT on ONEOK (OKE) Stock
summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) is one of the Best Stocks Under $100 to Invest In Now. On May 4, Truist analyst Gabe Daoud lifted its price objective on the company’s stock to $93 from $91 and kept a “Hold” rating on the shares. This came as part of the broader research note covering the midstream energy names after […]
